#Whale Eula Raiden Furina Rosaria. ~26s Rot. KQMS. Rotation Furina EDN1Q N1 > Rosa E > Eula tE > Rosa Q >  Eula Q N4 hE N4 > Rosa E > Raiden N4E N4D N4. Eula has 111% ER in this team.
options swap_delay=12 iteration=1000;

eula char lvl=90/90 cons=6 talent=10,10,10;
eula add weapon="sobp" refine=5 lvl=90/90;
eula add set="disenchantmentindeepshadow" count=4;
eula add stats hp=4780 atk=311 atk%=0.466 phys%=0.583 cd=0.622 ; #main
eula add stats def=39.36 def%=0.124 hp=507.88 hp%=0.0992 atk=33.08 atk%=0.1984 er=0.1102 em=39.64 cr=0.3972 cd=0.662;

raiden char lvl=90/90 cons=6 talent=10,10,10;
raiden add weapon="engulfinglightning" refine=5 lvl=90/90;
raiden add set="tom" count=4;
raiden add stats hp=4780 atk=311 er=0.518 electro%=0.466 cr=0.311 ; #main
raiden add stats def%=0.124 def=39.36 hp=507.88 hp%=0.0992 atk=33.08 atk%=0.1984 er=0.1102 em=39.64 cr=0.331 cd=0.7944;



rosaria char lvl=90/90 cons=6 talent=10,10,10; 
rosaria add weapon="favlance" refine=5 lvl=90/90;
rosaria add set="no" count=4;
rosaria add stats hp=4780 atk=311 atk%=0.466 cryo%=0.466 cr=0.311;
rosaria add stats def%=0.124 def=39.36 hp=507.88 hp%=0.0992 atk=33.08 atk%=0.1984 er=0.1102 em=39.64 cr=0.331 cd=0.7944;

active raiden;

target lvl=100 resist=0.1 radius=2 pos=0,2.4 hp=999999999; 
energy every interval=480,720 amount=1;
raiden skill;

for let i=0; i<4; i=i+1 {
	

	eula skill;
	rosaria burst;
	eula burst, walk, attack:4, skill[hold=1], walk[f=11], attack:4;
	rosaria skill;
	raiden burst, attack:4, skill, attack:4, dash, attack:4;
}
